# Tables

Table files are committed directly under `tables/`.

## Reference point symbols

```{r}
#| label: tbl-reference-point-symbols
#| tbl-cap: "Reference-point symbols and definitions used in the assessment report."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
table_data <- utils::read.csv("tables/reference_point_symbols.csv", check.names = FALSE)
knitr::kable(table_data)
```
